summary: Comprehensive testing of Staylet Phase 2 bug fixes completed. All 33 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend validation, CRUD operations, compliance status calculation, dashboard stats accuracy, and mobile responsiveness all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check and constants endpoints
Backend: User login with valid credentials
Backend: User login rejection with invalid credentials
Backend: Get current user (authenticated)
Backend: Password reset request (MOCKED)
Backend: Property validation - empty name rejected (400)
Backend: Property validation - whitespace name rejected (400)
Backend: Property validation - empty address rejected (400)
Backend: Property validation - whitespace address rejected (400)
Backend: Property validation - empty postcode rejected (400)
Backend: Property validation - whitespace postcode rejected (400)
Backend: Property CRUD - create, read, update, delete
Backend: Property search functionality
Backend: Compliance validation - empty title rejected (400)
Backend: Compliance validation - whitespace title rejected (400)
Backend: Compliance validation - empty category rejected (400)
Backend: Compliance record CRUD operations
Backend: Compliance status calculation - 'compliant' for future dates (>30 days)
Backend: Compliance status calculation - 'expiring_soon' for dates within 30 days
Backend: Compliance status calculation - 'overdue' for past dates
Backend: Dashboard stats structure and accuracy
Backend: Tasks CRUD operations
Frontend: Landing page loads correctly
Frontend: Login flow works
Frontend: Dashboard displays all 5 stat cards with accurate counts
Frontend: Property modal form validation (name, address, postcode required)
Frontend: Property modal whitespace validation
Frontend: Property creation and data refresh
Frontend: Property detail page loads
Frontend: Compliance page loads with filters
Frontend: Compliance table has overflow-x-auto for mobile responsiveness
Frontend: Mobile view renders correctly
Frontend: Navigation between all pages works
Frontend: Compliance status badges display correctly (compliant/expiring_soon/overdue)
seed_data_creation: Test properties and compliance records created during testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 2 bug fixes verified: backend validation for empty/whitespace fields, frontend form validation, compliance status calculation, dashboard stats accuracy, and mobile responsiveness. Password reset flow is MOCKED (returns success without sending email).

frontend_validation.property_modal: Shows validation errors for name, address, postcode when empty or whitespace
frontend_validation.compliance_modal: Shows validation error for title when empty

verified_fixes.mobile_responsiveness: Compliance table has overflow-x-auto class for horizontal scrolling
